dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Look at this place! I read about this old train station in the newspaper last week.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: It's wonderful! When did it close?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: In June, I think. Maybe two years ago. None of the bars are open anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: The windows are so dirty. We can't see inside properly.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Wait, there's a door in the back. Shall we walk around?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Yes, please! I'm very curious about this area.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Look at all these plants growing everywhere. They grow because of the rain, I think.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: It's beautiful in a natural way. The city council doesn't clean this place now.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Wait! Do you see that? Behind those plants?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: What is it? I can't see properly.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: It looks like... a graveyard. A very old one.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: You're right. I'm looking for a particular name. My grandfather mentioned this place.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Really? When did he talk about it?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Years ago, when I was young. He said his father is buried here.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's a strong connection to this area. Will you continue studying your family history?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Yes, I will. But this graveyard is in bad condition. Nobody takes care of it.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: I have an idea. We can do something about this.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: So, what's your thought? What can we do?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: We can clean this place. Starting with the windows and the plants

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That's a wonderful idea! When shall we begin?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: How about early next week? We'll need some extra time to prepare.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Perfect. I'll bring tools and cleaning materials. This is important to me.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: And I'll talk to the city council about it. Maybe they can help us.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Thank you. This day has been very special. I'm glad we walked here.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Me too. This is the beginning of something good for this area.
